title: plenasium angustifolium
intro: Plenasium angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved polypody or northern polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Plenasium angustifolium include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
